message:
test(runtime): raise undo/command.rs coverage with 45 new tests (bd-xcca9)

Add comprehensive tests for TextDeleteCmd, TextReplaceCmd, CommandBatch,
and edge cases in merge logic, rollback, redo, and error paths. Grows
test count from 30 to 75 covering previously untested execute/undo paths,
Debug impls, size_bytes, merge boundary conditions, and CommandError variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
